Name: Hyprstream Media
Author: danmaxis
Description: A visual now-playing surface for Stream Deck on Linux. Reads MPRIS (playerctl) to composite live album art under the transport glyph and mirror playback state on the key — play/pause, next, previous. Unlike transport-only plugins, the key shows the current cover for the focused player.

Actions.Name: Media Control
Actions.Tooltip: Tap to control the active MPRIS media player (Spotify, browsers, mpv, VLC, etc.) via playerctl. Modes: play-pause / next / previous. The play-pause icon reflects whether something is currently playing (▶ when paused, ❚❚ when playing) and updates within ~one second of state changes from anywhere. With Show Album Art enabled, local file:// art is composited under the glyph; HTTPS art (Spotify/Tidal) loads when 'Allow remote fetch' is also on. Requires: playerctl (pacman -S playerctl).

Actions.Name: Now Playing → OBS
Actions.Tooltip: Mirror the current MPRIS track into an OBS text source (and optionally an image source for album art) over obs-websocket v5 — the overlay updates itself on every track change, replacing the playerctl→systemd→text-file scripts DJs hand-roll. The key shows the current cover + track and an OBS badge that turns green when connected; press to force a re-push. Template placeholders: {artist}, {title}, {album}. Requires: playerctl and OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.
